title: Erugo
description: Self-hosted, WeTransfer-style file-sharing platform with secure links, passwords, and download limits, built on Laravel and Vue.
installation: Erugo stores all data (SQLite database, uploaded files, and config) under /var/www/html/storage, which is backed by a persistent volume; no external database add-on is required. The app listens on port 80. On first run, open the app URL to complete the setup wizard and create the initial admin account. Erugo generates its own APP_KEY on first boot if one is not provided. The container expects exclusive control of the mounted storage directory.
